headline: CarMax (KMX) Valuation Reassessed After Starboard Activism And Stronger Retail Sector Sentiment
summary: Fresh activist pressure and a stronger retail backdrop have pushed CarMax (KMX) back into focus, as investors weigh Starboard Value’s operational push in comparison with recent sector support from better than expected big box retailer earnings. See our latest analysis for CarMax. Recent gains have been sharp, with a 1 day share price return of 3.62% and 7 day return of 9.21%, but the 1 year total shareholder return is still down 35.23%, signaling attempts at a rebound after a difficult...
